title: Zzarty's Visible Powder Snow
description: The Visible Powder Snow texture pack for Minecraft adds frame around powder snow to make it more visible
body:
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Zzarty/CurseforgeImages/main/Visible_powder_snow_head.png)

The Visible powder snow texture pack for Minecraft will make your life easier with the updated appearance of the suspicious powder block. This texture pack adds 1 pixel frame around powder snow block, making block more visible.
